last_completed_item: D-069 — Controlled same-level fast travel between physically activated checkpoint teleport stations
current_item: D-070 — Puzzle, key, lock, and environmental-interaction complexity
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether levels use only simple combat-adjacent switches and key gates, use moderate optional environmental puzzles plus straightforward mandatory routing tasks, or include substantial mandatory multi-step puzzle sequences. Preserve combat-first pacing, substantial interconnected levels, alternate routes, secrets, deterministic mastery, accessibility across broad difficulty settings, checkpoint travel, and later Android controls. Include pacing interruption, exploration value, replay friction, readability, implementation and testing complexity, co-op implications, and whether puzzle solutions remain fixed or vary by difficulty. Put the agent recommendation after all A/B/C options, at the end of the card. After the user answers, persist D-070 to LIVE_DECISIONS.md, update intake_session.json, refresh NEW_CHAT_RESUME.md if its expected action changes, and update this handoff before asking anything else.
